CustomField.formula: if(TODAY()< DATE( YEAR( TODAY()), MONTH(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c), DAY(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)),DATE( YEAR( TODAY()), MONTH(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c), DAY(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)), DATE( YEAR(TODAY())+1, MONTH(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c), DAY(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Specifies each anniversary of lease expiration
CustomField.label: Contract Anniversary Date
